name: Tec-9 | 狂哮飓风
descriptionEn: An ideal pistol for the Terrorist on the move, the Tec-9 is lethal in close quarters and features a high magazine capacity. This memento from Ali has individual parts spray-painted solid colors in a tornado color scheme. Words are wind, but wind can kill
descriptionZh: 一把T进行机动作战的理想手枪，Tec-9 可以在近距离造成致命伤害，且弹匣容量较高。 这把来自阿里镇的纪念武器的部分零件以飓风的配色方案进行了整体喷漆。 言语像阵风，恶风却杀人
